rationale: Educ. Code §8.125 governs regional education service center grant contracts and is unrelated to the homestead exemption in Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Each regional education service center board of directors, under rules adopted by the commissioner, may enter into a contract for a grant from a public or private organization and may spend grant funds in accordance with the terms of the contract.
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this statute governing ESC grant contracts.
